camera_paths.dds: sensor_msgs/CompressedImage over ROS 2 DDS, best-effort keep-last QoS
camera_paths.webrtc: H.264 video over WebRTC using the detected low-latency GStreamer profile
camera_paths.zenoh: sensor_msgs/CompressedImage over zenoh-bridge-ros2dds with camera-throughput profile

metadata.camera_qos_policy: Camera-like ROS paths use best-effort keep-last QoS, normally depth 1, to model newest-frame semantics.
metadata.clock_correction: Sender/receiver clock offset is measured with scripts/clock_offset_probe.py and applied to each sample when available; no percentile-baseline subtraction is used.
metadata.decision_metric: Fresh-frame SLA: fresh decoded/received frames under the deadline divided by captured frames. Dropped and stale frames both count as failures.
research_basis: ROS 2 QoS sensor-data guidance: favor latest samples over guaranteed delivery for sensor streams.
W3C WebRTC statistics: dropped/rendered frames, jitter-buffer delay, and processing delay are standard media diagnostics.
Teleoperation benchmarks should vary bandwidth, latency, jitter, and loss while reporting video freshness, quality, and task-impacting delay.
metadata.title: Mode B camera transport benchmark

topologies.cloud: WSL robot to remote machine through Google Cloud hub/signaling
topologies.lan: WSL robot to remote machine over local LAN
topologies.vpn: WSL robot to remote machine over Tailscale

results.reason: Run artifact predates fresh-frame SLA and measured clock-offset metadata; rerun before publication.
